title: craft4dead
description: A reinterpretation of zombie survival, namely left 4 dead for a more relaxing gameplay, more similar to the last of us.
body:
![stalker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d08581d19fe797efe365f744ac6893233ea41062.png)

Craft4Dead offers a reinterpretation of zombie survival that focuses on more deliberate and thoughtful gameplay. Inspired by the depth and realism of The Last of Us, and retaining the essence of combat and cooperation from Left 4 Dead, this modpack transforms the adrenaline into a journey of exploration and discovery. Manage your resources, plan your moves, and uncover the mysteries of a post-apocalyptic world at your own pace and be aware of some running and chaotic hordes.
